title: Anyone else find Shinji as annoying as Minmei from Robotech
display_title: Anyone else find Shinji as annoying as Minmei from Robotech
wikitext:
[]: Anyone else find Shinji as annoying as Minmei from Robotech             Quote Post by abrax894 » Thu Dec 09, 2010 5:07 pm Ok, so I love this series, please don't get me wrong in that. But this guy...... sometimes I want to toss him out the nearest 20th floor window..... after strangling him, smothering him with a pillow, and beating him over the head with a large stick. Usually people who go through the kind of stress this guy goes through do one of two things. Grow a pair or crack. If they grow a pair, they generally kick ass, if they crack, THEY DO NOT GO BACK AND FIGHT SOME MORE. That is the one shortcoming of this anime. It likes to go into this in-depth analysis of the human psyche but it completely misses this. *Sigh. Although interestingly enough, I've noticed something about a number of different anime's recently. Japanese culture could be classified as a 'machismo' culture, where men have, in general have a HUGE ego and are constantly trying to prove it. So why is it in so many anime's that the main male character is usually the most worthless, cowardly, stupid guy on the planet....... Does this bother anyone but me?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Dec 09, 2010 5:16 pm Words are failing me right now.

[]:             Quote Post by abrax894 » Thu Dec 09, 2010 5:19 pm Yeah, I just finished watching the series and the manga again...... so it was vent time.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Dec 09, 2010 5:21 pm Related http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=6154 http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=4424 and also http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=8512 http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=9918 http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=3375 http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=5637 http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=2478 http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=2340 I've never seen any Macross, so can't personally compare with Minmay.

[]: Re: Anyone else find Shinji as annoying as Minmei from Robot             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Dec 09, 2010 5:22 pm abrax894 wrote: If they grow a pair, they generally kick ass, if they crack, THEY DO NOT GO BACK AND FIGHT SOME MORE. That is the one shortcoming of this anime. It likes to go into this in-depth analysis of the human psyche but it completely misses this.

[]:             Quote Post by Fireball » Thu Dec 09, 2010 5:22 pm michaeljacksonpopcorn.gif

[]: Re: Anyone else find Shinji as annoying as Minmei from Robot             Quote Post by abrax894 » Thu Dec 09, 2010 5:44 pm Sachi wrote: Congratulations, you completely missed the point. What makes the characters so relatable and brilliant is that fact that they can't seem to break out of their issues; their archetypes aren't fullfilled and they are instead left even more broken. The most apparent example of this is during the big climax in EoE when Shinji decides he'd rather live, and then he breaks down once more before the credits roll.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Thu Dec 09, 2010 5:54 pm >Robotech OH YOU NOW YOU'VE DONE IT I really don't care if Shinji is as annoying as Minmay or not (at least he still wouldn't be motherfucking Kaifun) but mentioning Robotech is instant raeg. Fucking Harmony Gold how does it work SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Thu Dec 09, 2010 5:58 pm Yeah, cause by not fighting he certainly assured that his friend would survive and O, yeah, the rest of the world can go to hell. Instead, he get's angry cause his father made the shi**y call and activated the dummy plug. Yes, his father is a monster, I'm not denying that, but he still made the right call. The fact is, Shinji doesn't think, he doesn't grow up, when it comes to anything hard he just curls up in a ball and cries. Yeah, good call...... The world is going to hell and he just sits there and cries when he's the only one that can do anything about it.......

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Thu Dec 09, 2010 6:52 pm Fireball wrote: michaeljacksonpopcorn.gif

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Thu Dec 09, 2010 7:36 pm Killing Kaworu showed he learned from the 03 incident that sometimes the shitty call needs to be made. Because of this (and his decisions to stick things out in 4 and 19) I maintain that Shinji isn't all bad. Well, unless we're talking about the EoE branch of the story. That version of Shinji is worthless, I agree.

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Thu Dec 09, 2010 8:14 pm NemZ wrote: Well, unless we're talking about the EoE branch of the story. That version of Shinji is worthless, I agree.

[]:             Quote Post by abrax894 » Thu Dec 09, 2010 8:40 pm Xard wrote: >Robotech OH YOU NOW YOU'VE DONE IT I really don't care if Shinji is as annoying as Minmay or not (at least he still wouldn't be motherfucking Kaifun) but mentioning Robotech is instant raeg. Fucking Harmony Gold how does it work SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Thu Dec 09, 2010 11:55 pm SPOILERS: emotionally-disturbed 14 year olds don't react to things the way mentally stable adults do.

[]:             Quote Post by abrax894 » Fri Dec 10, 2010 8:17 am chee wrote: SPOILERS: emotionally-disturbed 14 year olds don't react to things the way mentally stable adults do.

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Fri Dec 10, 2010 11:49 am Finally someone who hates Minmay as much as I do.

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Fri Dec 10, 2010 11:56 am Shinji's such a loser for hating getting to pilot that big cool robot that hurts him all the time! I wish I could be boiled alive and have to kill my friends.

[]:             Quote Post by Anti-Goth » Fri Dec 10, 2010 12:00 pm InstrumentalityOne wrote: Finally someone who hates Minmay as much as I do.

[]:             Quote Post by honsou » Fri Dec 10, 2010 12:05 pm abrax894 wrote: ....... I could counter that point but honestly this debate is becoming pointless. Shinji was annoying me after his melodramatic pity parties he kept having, so I needed to vent. If you all don't agree, well, whatever.... I'm done venting now.

[]:             Quote Post by Shogo-Kun » Fri Dec 10, 2010 12:28 pm These are pretty much the reasons I find the Rebiuld Shinji more likeable, because the pity parties are kept to a minimum. Anno knows how to pay for top billing.
